title: Data Dictionary for boston311-2025.tsv
description:
This dataset contains approximately 267,187 municipal service request records, documenting the lifecycle of various public works and community-related tasks. It includes temporal data such as opening, target, and closure timestamps, alongside detailed categorization via subject areas, reason codes, and operational queues. Geographic information is provided through specific addresses, neighborhood identifiers, and precise coordinates to facilitate spatial analysis. The records originate from multiple sources, including citizen-facing applications and internal employee tools, to track service efficiency and resolution status.

## Notable Characteristics

* **Temporal Range:** The dataset captures operational activity throughout the year 2025, tracking cases from their opening through to their resolution.
* **Data Sparsity and Null Values:** There is significant sparsity in fields such as `closed_photo` and `submitted_photo`. Additionally, the `closed_dt` field contains a high number of null values (approximately 26.8%), which logically represents cases that remain in an "Open" status.
* **High-Precision Spatial Data:** The dataset includes precise latitude, longitude, and street-level address information. This allows for highly accurate mapping but results in high cardinality within spatial fields.
* **PII/Privacy Considerations:** The inclusion of exact street addresses and precise geographic coordinates may constitute Personally Identifiable Information (PII) depending on the sensitivity of the specific case types.
* **Operational Structure:** The data is designed to support service-level agreement (SLA) monitoring, featuring structured fields for status tracking, department assignment, and task queues.
* **Integrity:** The `_id` and `case_enquiry_id` fields demonstrate perfect uniqueness, ensuring each record is distinct within the system.

_id.title: Record ID
_id.description: Internal unique system identifier for the record.

case_enquiry_id.title: Case Enquiry ID
case_enquiry_id.description: Unique business identifier for the specific case or enquiry.

open_dt.title: Open Date/Time
open_dt.description: The timestamp when the case was officially opened.

sla_target_dt.title: SLA Target Date/Time
sla_target_dt.description: The target deadline for resolving the case based on Service Level Agreements.

closed_dt.title: Closed Date/Time
closed_dt.description: The timestamp when the case was officially closed.

on_time.title: On-Time Status
on_time.description: Indicator of whether the case was closed on or before the sla_target_dt.

case_status.title: Case Status
case_status.description: The current lifecycle state of the case (e.g., Open, Closed).

closure_reason.title: Closure Reason
closure_reason.description: Detailed text explaining why the case was closed.
